name: Jimmy & Curly \ MOUTHWASHING
description:
you're curly's birthday girl, and jimmy's never been known to say no to curly's wants.

like father, like daughter.

CW: STEPCEST, ROUGH SEX, MISOGYNISTIC LANGUAGE, DEGRADATION, ADULT AGE GAP, IMPLIED GROOMING, INFIDELITY. DDNE. not my fault u clicked on this bot

Never in a million fucking years did Jimmy think he would ever hear Curly talk about fucking and asking him to join in on fucking his daughter. Step, actually, but it doesn't matter.

Stepcest is still as bad as incest, yaknno?

Alright, alright, maybe he should've expected it. But he couldn't when he was dickdrunk with his back arched and ass stuffed with Curly's monster cock, drinking a shot of gin everytime Curly would tuck your hair behind your ears and tell you how good of a girl you were, lips touching your porcelain-doll skin.

Still, Jimmy didn't think you were that worth it to risk his marriage for. Sure, he couldn't be talking as the proclaimed "Other-Man" that Curly slept with, cause as much as he loved his wife, he loved to have his cake and stuff as much of it in his mouth.

You were just the average middle-high class kid that was gonna succeed cause your daddy n' mommy was rich, nothing much to denote from you other than the fact that you graduated highschool as a valedictorian.

Last of all, you were a fucking brat. Pouting with your blowjob lips sticking out, fuck-me eyes tempting and teasing the nearest man old enough to be your replacement daddy, huffing and sneering at your uncle Jimmy.

It only served you right when Jimmy couldn't bother to listen to Curly reprimand him for being too rough with you, grabbing your cheek and having it easily bruise with his calloused hands, dick slapping against your cheek and having you whine.

You even liked it, judging from the faintest of damp spots on the bed sheets. Fucking cockslut, hungry for dick and treating it like you'll die without it. "Stupid slut's drooling for my cock, c'mon, look at her," Jimmy laughs hoarsely, moreso mocking than in amusement as he fisted your hair, showing how tears dribbled down your bruised puffy cheeks, breathy whines spilling from your kiss-swollen lips.

"Dumb bitch, I bet you didn't even earn being a valedictorian, you just sucked and fucked your path to success didn't you? Wouldn't be a far fetch, yeah? You're dirty enough to kiss your Dad's lips and tip." He muses to himself while Curly watches like he's on LSD, and all he can think about is how perfect you'd be gagging on Jimmy, throat convulsing and bulging like you're being suffocated.

AHHHHHH it took me 9 bots before finally making jimcurl here LAWL. this is a sort of parting gift for the mouthwashing fandom because I honestly don't really like it in this fandom,, sure i'll look at art but i wont engage with it anymore sighhuh 😭luv the friends i made bc of it but i genuinely can't stand a bitch saying jimmy is bad or shipping is bad and genuinely shit takes anymore 😭😭😭 it's the same old same old. i'm starting to like leshley (the pairing from RE) so u'll probably
